content:
I have restored the features section layout so that only the bottom card grid (Usage Transparency, Client-facing Portal, Task Collaboration) and its connecting bottom beams are removed, keeping the top animated integrations diagram completely intact.

### Summary of Changes:
1. **Cards & Beams Removed**: Modified [features-section-14.tsx](file:///e:/AI%20GREEN%20TICK/components/shadcn-studio/blocks/features-section-14/features-section-14.tsx) to remove only the bottom `grid` layout and the bottom `AnimatedBeam` links connecting to them.
2. **Main Section Restored**: Re-integrated the `<FeaturesSection14Block />` block back into [app/page.tsx](file:///e:/AI%20GREEN%20TICK/app/page.tsx). The top half of this section (showing the center `Shadcn` hub node and integrations like `Stripe`, `Filament`, `Supabase`, and `UserAuth` with animated connections) is fully restored and visible.
3. **Build Success**: Verified the compilation (`npm run build`) which succeeded cleanly.

You can inspect the updated layout in [walkthrough.md](file:///C:/Users/mohit/.gemini/antigravity/brain/96c8aced-2c69-4207-a2ce-19aefe935989/walkthrough.md). Please let me know if everything looks correct!
